scripts.install:all: npm --prefix backend install && npm --prefix frontend install
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:backend && npm run typecheck:frontend
scripts.typecheck:backend: node scripts/run-with-env.js npm --prefix backend run typecheck
scripts.validate:prisma: node scripts/run-with-env.js npm --prefix backend run prisma:validate
scripts.verify: npm run validate:env && npm run validate:prisma && npm run typecheck
scripts.build: npm run verify && npm run build:backend && npm run build:frontend
scripts.build:backend: node scripts/run-with-env.js npm --prefix backend run build
scripts.dev:backend: node scripts/run-with-env.js npm --prefix backend run dev
scripts.docker:build: npm run verify && docker compose build
scripts.docker:up: npm run verify && docker compose up -d
scripts.docker:deploy: npm run verify && docker compose up -d --build
